location: A ground pickup, no fight required — found beside a broken, overturned supply wagon with spilled sacks, north of the Liurnia Highway North Site of Grace in Liurnia of the Lakes.
tactics: No enemy guards this exact spot, though roaming soldier patrols nearby on Liurnia's eastern battlefield roads warrant caution.
It's easy to miss since it blends visually with the other wreckage and scattered sacks around the wagon.
Liurnia Highway North grace is the closest fast-travel point if you need to reorient.
lore: A polearm topped with a hardened, beak-shaped spike built to punch through armor. Though meant chiefly for thrusting, its long haft can also hook around a raised guard with a sideways swing.

builds.name: Dexterity-leaning Halberd
builds.why: C scaling in Dexterity with lighter weight (7.0) than most halberds makes it a nimble early pick for Dexterity or hybrid quality builds.
